evals.prompt: validate the shell script at skills/shellcheck/evals/test-script.sh using the shellcheck skill
evals.expected_output: Report showing shell script validation errors with SC codes and fixes
expectations: Output references running shellcheck or shell script validation
Output identifies specific errors like SC2086, SC2164, SC2155, or similar SC codes
Output suggests concrete fixes for each error found

evals.prompt: validate all shell scripts in this repository using the shellcheck skill
evals.expected_output: Validation report covering shell scripts found in the repository
expectations: Output references shellcheck or shell script validation
Output scans for .sh files across the repository
Output reports validation results (pass or fail with details)

evals.prompt: check my shell script for portability issues between bash and sh using the shellcheck skill
evals.expected_output: Portability-focused validation identifying bash-isms and POSIX compliance issues
expectations: Output references portability, POSIX, bash-isms, or shell compatibility
Output identifies bash-specific features used with sh shebang or suggests -s flag
Output provides fix guidance for portability issues found
